triples.subject: The Joint Office of Energy and Transportation
triples.object: government to accelerate zero-emission fueling and transportation projects
triples.sentence: The Joint Office of Energy and Transportation (Joint Office) is your partner in government to accelerate zero-emission fueling and transportation projects and bring energy innovation to life.

triples.subject: The Joint Office
triples.object: standards and frameworks for the electric vehicle (EV) charging industry
triples.sentence: In addition to funding opportunities, the Joint Office has established the standards and frameworks for the electric vehicle (EV) charging industry to innovate on a secure, interoperable foundation and move forward with confidence in the longevity of their investments.

triples.subject: Government funding
triples.sentence: Government funding complements private investment, filling in gaps in the national charging network to make it easy for everyone to choose to ride and drive electric.

triples.subject: Public sector support
triples.sentence: Public sector support for approaches such as curbside Level 2 charging is crucial to give more mobility choices to people who can’t access charging at home.

triples.subject: Private sector companies
triples.object: bid into the National Electric Vehicle Infrastructure (NEVI) Formula Program
triples.sentence: Private sector companies are invited to bid into the National Electric Vehicle Infrastructure (NEVI) Formula Program and Charging and Fueling Infrastructure Program opportunities released by states and communities.

triples.subject: The Joint Office
triples.sentence: The Joint Office also supports zero-emission transit and school buses.

triples.subject: The Joint Office
triples.object: the National Charging Experience (ChargeX) Consortium and Electric Vehicle Working Group (EVWG)
triples.sentence: To facilitate public and private sector communication about zero-emission technology trends, opportunities, and challenges, the Joint Office regularly convenes the National Charging Experience (ChargeX) Consortium and Electric Vehicle Working Group (EVWG).

triples.subject: The Joint Office
triples.object: strategic frameworks such as the National Zero-Emission Freight Corridor Strategy
triples.sentence: The Joint Office also develops strategic frameworks such as the National Zero-Emission Freight Corridor Strategy to align public and private sector investment in the future of transportation.
